title: cache_pattern: unnecessary clone of base string
description: In lib.rs cache_pattern (line 484): let base = format!(...); ... cache.insert(base.clone(), re); let ci = format!("(?i){base}"); The clone is unnecessary because ci can be built before the insert, allowing base to move into cache.insert. Fix: reorder to build ci first, then insert base by move. This avoids one heap allocation per cached pattern.
